name: Passion Fruit Puree and Mousse
steps: Mix the puree and the sugar.
Bring to the boil whisking constantly.
Allow to cool and then blend into a puree.
Return to heat and cook until sugar is completely caramelized.
Remove from the heat and spread out over a non-stick mat.
Serve with a rosette of the mousse on the centre of the plate.
Spoon the meringue over the mousse with the spoon and fill with the passion fruit puree.
Place under a hot grill and burn the top of the meringue.
